name: Cheesecake Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin with 3 tablespoons sugar and salt in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add 1 packet Butter Buds, 1/2 cup pineapple juice, and milk to the gelatin mixture. Place over boiling water and cook, stirring constantly, until the gelatin dissolves and the mixture thickens slightly.
3. In a medium bowl, beat cottage cheese until smooth (use a potato masher for best results).
4. Add crushed pineapple and lemon peel to the cottage cheese mixture.
5. Combine graham cracker crumbs, remaining packet of Butter Buds, and vanilla in a separate small bowl. Add the remaining pineapple juice and lemon juice; mix well.
6. Stir the buttery crust into the cottage cheese mixture.
7. In another bowl, beat egg whites until they hold their shape. Gradually add the remaining sugar and beat until stiff. Fold into the crumb-cheese mixture.
8. Pour the batter into a 9-inch pie plate and chill until firm.
Note: Press the crumbs into the bottom of the pie plate first, then pour the cheesecake filling over it. Chill before serving.
